info.title: Platform Caliper 1.2 Event Projection API
info.summary: Generated Caliper event projection API schemas from the structured Caliper dictionary source.
info.description: This OpenAPI document is generated from dictionary/caliper-core.v1.json. It documents the planned Caliper event ingestion and projection API for envelopes, immutable events, entities, actors, context, profile rules, and governed extensions. It is not a formal Caliper certification claim and is not executable on GitHub Pages until a backend is added.

servers.description: Portal host; Caliper endpoints are planned documentation until backend runtime exists.

CaliperEnvelope.description: One Sensor API payload received from a tool, platform, or app.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this received Caliper envelope.

tenantId.description: The school, district, or customer boundary that owns this event payload.

sensorId.description: The tool, platform, app, or sensor that sent the payload.

sendTime.description: When the sensor says it sent the payload.

dataVersion.description: The Caliper context or version used to interpret the payload.

x-valueDescriptions.http://purl.imsglobal.org/ctx/caliper/v1: The JSON-LD context IRI used for Caliper 1.2 payloads.

eventCount.description: How many event objects were found in the payload.

receivedAt.description: When the platform received the payload.

validationStatus.description: Whether the payload was accepted, rejected, or held for review.

x-valueDescriptions.received: The payload was received but has not completed validation.
x-valueDescriptions.valid: The payload passed validation for the platform's current projection.
x-valueDescriptions.rejected: The payload failed validation and should not be projected.
x-valueDescriptions.quarantined: The payload is held for review because policy, privacy, or schema checks need attention.

rawPayload.description: The original JSON-LD payload retained for audit, replay, and conformance review.

CaliperEvent.description: One immutable learning activity event projected from a Caliper envelope.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this projected event row.

envelopeId.description: The received Caliper envelope that contained this event.

eventIri.description: The globally unique event identifier supplied by the sender.

eventType.description: The Caliper event class, such as AssessmentEvent, MediaEvent, or ToolLaunchEvent.

x-valueDescriptions.AnnotationEvent: A person creates or shares an annotation on a digital resource.
x-valueDescriptions.AssessmentEvent: A person works with a whole assessment.
x-valueDescriptions.AssessmentItemEvent: A person works with one assessment item or question.
x-valueDescriptions.AssignableEvent: A person works with assigned digital content.
x-valueDescriptions.FeedbackEvent: A person comments on or rates something.
x-valueDescriptions.ForumEvent: A person subscribes or unsubscribes from a forum.
x-valueDescriptions.GradeEvent: A person or app grades an attempt.
x-valueDescriptions.MediaEvent: A person interacts with audio, video, or media.
x-valueDescriptions.MessageEvent: A person posts or marks a message.
x-valueDescriptions.NavigationEvent: A person navigates to a resource, app, or location.
x-valueDescriptions.QuestionnaireEvent: A person starts or submits a questionnaire.
x-valueDescriptions.QuestionnaireItemEvent: A person works with one questionnaire item.
x-valueDescriptions.ResourceManagementEvent: A person manages a digital resource.
x-valueDescriptions.SearchEvent: A person searches a resource or app.
x-valueDescriptions.SessionEvent: A person or app starts, ends, or times out a session.
x-valueDescriptions.SurveyEvent: A person opts into or out of a survey.
x-valueDescriptions.SurveyInvitationEvent: A person sends or responds to a survey invitation.
x-valueDescriptions.ThreadEvent: A person marks a forum thread read or unread.
x-valueDescriptions.ToolLaunchEvent: A person launches or returns from a tool.
x-valueDescriptions.ToolUseEvent: A person uses a software application.

profile.description: The Caliper profile that explains which event, action, actor, object, and generated values are expected.

x-valueDescriptions.GeneralProfile: Generic profile for events not covered by a narrower profile.
x-valueDescriptions.AnnotationProfile: Annotation, bookmark, highlight, share, and tag activity.
x-valueDescriptions.ReadingProfile: Reading, navigation, and viewing resource activity.
x-valueDescriptions.ResourceManagementProfile: Resource creation, upload, publish, print, download, and similar management activity.
x-valueDescriptions.SessionProfile: Login, logout, and timeout session activity.
x-valueDescriptions.ToolLaunchProfile: LTI or tool launch and return activity.

x-valueDescriptions.Abandoned: A user abandoned something before completion.
x-valueDescriptions.Accepted: A user accepted an invitation or request.
x-valueDescriptions.Attached: Something was attached to another thing.
x-valueDescriptions.ClosedPopout: A media popout or window was closed.
x-valueDescriptions.Completed: A user completed an item or task.
x-valueDescriptions.Created: A resource or entity was created.
x-valueDescriptions.Declined: A user declined an invitation or request.
x-valueDescriptions.Deleted: A resource or entity was deleted.
x-valueDescriptions.Described: Metadata or description was added or changed.
x-valueDescriptions.Highlighted: Text or resource content was highlighted.
x-valueDescriptions.JumpedTo: Media or navigation jumped to a location.
x-valueDescriptions.Launched: A tool or app was launched.
x-valueDescriptions.MarkedAsRead: A message or thread was marked read.
x-valueDescriptions.MarkedAsUnread: A message or thread was marked unread.
x-valueDescriptions.Modified: A resource or entity was changed.
x-valueDescriptions.NavigatedTo: A user navigated to a resource or location.
x-valueDescriptions.OpenedPopout: A media popout or window was opened.
x-valueDescriptions.Ranked: A user rated or ranked something.
x-valueDescriptions.Reset: Activity or an attempt was reset.
x-valueDescriptions.Returned: A user returned from a launched tool or workflow.
x-valueDescriptions.Saved: A resource or work item was saved.
x-valueDescriptions.Sent: A message or invitation was sent.
x-valueDescriptions.Skipped: A learner skipped an item or task.
x-valueDescriptions.Started: A learner or user started something.
x-valueDescriptions.Submitted: Work or an attempt was submitted.
x-valueDescriptions.Uploaded: A resource or file was uploaded.
x-valueDescriptions.Used: A user used a tool or application.

actorId.description: The indexed person, app, or agent that performed the action.

objectId.description: The indexed entity that the actor acted on.

edAppId.description: The indexed application where the event happened.

generatedId.description: The indexed entity created or produced by the event, such as an attempt, response, score, annotation, or search response.

targetId.description: A specific location or target inside the object, such as a media location, page, link, or question target.

referrerId.description: The prior app, page, resource, or context that led to this event.

groupId.description: The class, course, group, or organization context for the event.

membershipId.description: The actor's role and status relationship in the group context.

sessionId.description: The app or user session that groups related events.

federatedSessionId.description: The LTI or federated session context connected to a tool launch.

rawEvent.description: The original event JSON-LD object retained for audit, replay, and deeper profile-specific projection.

CaliperEntity.description: A normalized index entry for a Caliper person, app, resource, attempt, score, session, or other event object.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this indexed entity.

entityIri.description: The Caliper IRI or source identifier for the entity.

entityType.description: The Caliper entity class, such as Person, Assessment, Score, Session, or DigitalResource.

x-valueDescriptions.AggregateMeasure: A computed usage or learning metric.
x-valueDescriptions.Annotation: A note or mark connected to a digital resource.
x-valueDescriptions.AssignableDigitalResource: Digital content assigned to a learner.
x-valueDescriptions.Attempt: One try at an assignment, assessment, or questionnaire.
x-valueDescriptions.DateTimeQuestion: Question asking for a date or time.
x-valueDescriptions.Frame: Segment or location in a resource.
x-valueDescriptions.LearningObjective: Learning goal or objective, preferably linked to CASE when available.
x-valueDescriptions.Membership: A person's relationship to a group or organization.
x-valueDescriptions.Organization: School, district, provider, or other organization.
x-valueDescriptions.Question: Question prompt.
x-valueDescriptions.TextPositionSelector: Text-range selector without an entity ID.
x-valueDescriptions.SystemIdentifier: Other system identifier without an entity ID.

name.description: A human-readable name for the entity when one is supplied.

description.description: A short explanation or label for the entity.

dateCreated.description: When the source says this entity was created.

dateModified.description: When the source says this entity last changed.

otherIdentifiers.description: Other identifiers known for this entity, such as SIS, LTI, OneRoster, or internal IDs.

extensions.description: Governed source-specific fields carried on the entity.

canonicalPersonId.description: The platform person ID when policy and identifiers allow this entity to resolve to a known person.

canonicalResourceId.description: The platform resource, QTI, CASE, or content ID when this entity resolves to known learning content.

CaliperActor.description: The person, application, group, or agent that performs a Caliper event action.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this actor projection.

entityId.description: The indexed Caliper entity that represents the actor.

actorType.description: Whether the actor is a person, software app, group, or generic agent.

x-valueDescriptions.Agent: A generic person or software agent.
x-valueDescriptions.SoftwareApplication: An app or tool acting as the event actor.
x-valueDescriptions.Group: A group acting as or standing in for the actor.

platformPersonId.description: The resolved platform person ID when the actor is a known school user.

displayName.description: A display name supplied for the actor or resolved from a trusted source.

identifierType.description: The kind of source identifier used to resolve the actor.

identifierValue.description: The source identifier value used for matching or lineage.

resolutionStatus.description: Whether the actor was matched to a canonical platform record.

x-valueDescriptions.resolved: The actor or entity was matched to a canonical platform record.
x-valueDescriptions.unresolved: The actor or entity remains source-only until a safe match is available.
x-valueDescriptions.conflict: The source identifiers matched multiple possible platform records.
x-valueDescriptions.blocked_by_policy: Privacy or tenant policy prevents canonical matching.

CaliperContext.description: The group, membership, session, and LTI context surrounding a Caliper event.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this event context projection.

eventId.description: The Caliper event this context belongs to.

groupEntityId.description: The Caliper group, course section, organization, or class context entity.

membershipEntityId.description: The Caliper membership entity that describes the actor's relationship to the group.

membershipRole.description: The LIS role supplied in the Caliper membership context.

membershipStatus.description: Whether the membership is active or inactive in the source context.

x-valueDescriptions.Active: The membership or status is active.
x-valueDescriptions.Inactive: The membership or status is inactive.

sessionEntityId.description: The Caliper session entity that groups related activity.

federatedSessionEntityId.description: The LTI or federated session entity connected to the event.

ltiMessageType.description: The LTI launch message type when the event came from an LTI workflow.

ltiPlatformId.description: The LTI platform issuer or platform identifier tied to the federated session.

ltiDeploymentId.description: The LTI deployment identifier that scopes the tool relationship.

ltiContextId.description: The LTI course or context identifier supplied by the platform.

CaliperProfileRule.description: A governed row describing an expected Caliper profile, event, action, actor, object, and generated or target combination.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this profile rule.

profile.description: The Caliper profile the rule belongs to.

x-valueDescriptions.GeneralProfile: Generic profile for events not covered by a narrower profile.
x-valueDescriptions.AnnotationProfile: Annotation, bookmark, highlight, share, and tag activity.
x-valueDescriptions.ReadingProfile: Reading, navigation, and viewing resource activity.
x-valueDescriptions.ResourceManagementProfile: Resource creation, upload, publish, print, download, and similar management activity.
x-valueDescriptions.SessionProfile: Login, logout, and timeout session activity.
x-valueDescriptions.ToolLaunchProfile: LTI or tool launch and return activity.

eventType.description: The Caliper event class allowed by the profile rule.

actorType.description: The expected actor class for the profile rule.

x-valueDescriptions.Agent: A generic person or software agent.
x-valueDescriptions.SoftwareApplication: An app or tool acting as the event actor.
x-valueDescriptions.Group: A group acting as or standing in for the actor.

allowedAction.description: One action allowed for this event/profile combination.

objectType.description: The expected object entity type for the rule.

x-valueDescriptions.AggregateMeasure: A computed usage or learning metric.
x-valueDescriptions.Annotation: A note or mark connected to a digital resource.
x-valueDescriptions.AssignableDigitalResource: Digital content assigned to a learner.
x-valueDescriptions.Attempt: One try at an assignment, assessment, or questionnaire.
x-valueDescriptions.DateTimeQuestion: Question asking for a date or time.
x-valueDescriptions.Frame: Segment or location in a resource.
x-valueDescriptions.LearningObjective: Learning goal or objective, preferably linked to CASE when available.
x-valueDescriptions.Membership: A person's relationship to a group or organization.
x-valueDescriptions.Organization: School, district, provider, or other organization.
x-valueDescriptions.Question: Question prompt.
x-valueDescriptions.TextPositionSelector: Text-range selector without an entity ID.
x-valueDescriptions.SystemIdentifier: Other system identifier without an entity ID.

generatedOrTargetType.description: The generated entity, target entity, or narrative condition expected by the rule.

platformGuidance.description: How the platform should validate, project, or join events matching this rule.

CaliperExtension.description: A governed custom field found under a Caliper extensions object.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this extension projection.

ownerType.description: Whether this extension belongs to an envelope, event, entity, actor, or context row.

x-valueDescriptions.envelope: The extension belongs to a Caliper envelope.
x-valueDescriptions.event: The extension belongs to a Caliper event.
x-valueDescriptions.entity: The extension belongs to a Caliper entity.
x-valueDescriptions.actor: The extension belongs to a Caliper actor projection.
x-valueDescriptions.context: The extension belongs to a Caliper context projection.

ownerId.description: The platform row ID that owns this extension value.

namespace.description: The governed namespace or vendor domain for the extension key.

extensionKey.description: The extension field name within the namespace.

extensionValue.description: The normalized scalar value when the extension can be safely indexed.

privacyClassification.description: The platform privacy classification assigned to this extension value.

x-valueDescriptions.public: The extension can be treated as public metadata.
x-valueDescriptions.education_record: The extension may identify or describe a student's education record.
x-valueDescriptions.behavioral: The extension describes learning behavior or activity.
x-valueDescriptions.restricted: The extension is sensitive and requires explicit policy before use.

allowedByPolicy.description: Whether tenant policy allows this extension to be retained and queried.

x-unsupported-or-deferred.area: Full Sensor API validation, immutable storage, and replay/idempotency handling
x-unsupported-or-deferred.reason: A minimal authenticated receipt Edge Function exists. Full Sensor API conformance still needs profile validation, immutable event storage, replay handling, retention policy, and operational controls.
The first generated slice indexes core event/entity fields and preserves raw JSON-LD while profile-specific projections are added incrementally based on product value.
Requires retention, aggregation, access control, and de-identification decisions beyond the event receipt path.
Requires conformance testing and organizational certification work beyond these generated dictionary artifacts.
